nodes.label: Boost.ts
nodes.description: Defines all damage/heal boost definitions (perk-based multipliers) via a declarative BOOST_DEFS array. Each BoostDef specifies a source name, type, optional custom calcFn or simple multiplierPerPerk, attack-type applicability, proc coefficient gating, and toggle support. Also provides helper functions for minion absorption and frenzy calculations, plus Penance bleed constants.

nodes.label: calcMinionAbsorptionPotency
nodes.description: Calculates the damage potency for Minion Absorption perk based on summon boost percentage and stacks.

nodes.label: calcFrenzyPct
nodes.description: Computes the Frenzy damage percentage from rage potency using FRENZY_BASE + FRENZY_RAGE_MULT.

nodes.label: BoostContext
nodes.description: Input context for boost custom calcFn functions. Contains all runtime state: perks, crit chance, jump/summon/rage/bounce/tailwind potency, speed, attack speed, darkness, emotional state, HP fill, weapon art selection, and damage type flags.

nodes.label: BoostDef
nodes.description: Defines a single boost entry: sourceName, type (dmg/heal), optional multiplierPerPerk for simple boosts, optional calcFn for complex conditional boosts, attack-type applicability (appliesTo), proc coefficient requirements, and user toggle support.

nodes.label: BOOST_DEFS
nodes.description: Array of all BoostDef entries covering ~35 perks including Blood Thirsty, Venom Spitter, Frostbite, Perfection, Stealth, Golden Crits, Primal, Frenzy, Dark One, Minion Absorption, Penance, and many weapon-art-specific boosts.

nodes.label: BOOST_DEF_MAP
nodes.description: Map<string, BoostDef> for O(1) lookup of boost definitions by sourceName.

nodes.label: BuffData.ts
nodes.description: Central buff/debuff data module. Defines all buff definitions (BUFF_DEFS) with colors, descriptions, and effect-per-potency values. Contains item-granted buffs (ITEM_BUFF_MAP), perk-buff factories (PERK_BUFFS), weapon-art buffs, and race buffs. Provides buff assembly pipeline (assembleActiveBuffs), perk modifier application (applyBuffPerkModifiers), Tailwind→Whirlwind conversion, True Balance debuff→buff conversions, Cauterize burn→singed conversion, and buff effect calculation/formatting utilities.

nodes.label: BuffDefinition
nodes.description: Defines a buff type's metadata: name, color, description (optionally dynamic), effectPerTenthPotency, effectUnit, optional statKey, and flags for debuff/self-debuff/neutral/potencyCapped.

nodes.label: GrantedBuff
nodes.description: Represents a specific buff instance: buffName, potency, optional base/bonus potency, duration, condition string, sourceName, sourceType (perk/weaponArt/rune/cantrip/race), isSelfDebuff flag, and burnMode for Cauterize interaction.

nodes.label: BUFF_DEFS
nodes.description: Record of all buff/debuff/neutral type definitions. Includes buffs (Rage, Bounce, Regen, Reinforce, Tailwind, Whirlwind, Critical Boost, Perfection, Air Pressure, Magic Reinforce, Luminescent, Draconic Infusion, Lightning Cloak, Bloodlust, Glyph Conduit), debuffs (Slowness, Despair, Weakness, Bleed, Burn, Singed, Poison, Frostbite, Sticky variants, Shatter, Electrical Rend, Hypnotized, Taunt, Anti Heal, Wound), and neutrals (Last Croak, Tongue Shot, Beenades, Ancient Shield, Quickdraw, Exhaust, Converted Energy, Hex Shield, Steam Buildup, Bursting).

nodes.label: applyBuffPerkModifiers
nodes.description: Core buff modifier pipeline. For each granted buff, applies specific buff modifiers (e.g., Gladiatorial Rage adds to Rage potency, Bounce Momentum extends duration), Bastion Bless bonuses, Trickster reflection for Despair self-debuffs, generic debuff modifiers (Endless Despair, Stored Corruption), Contained duration multiplier, Dark One duration for self-debuffs, and Warding debuff multiplier accounting.

nodes.label: assembleActiveBuffs
nodes.description: Main buff assembly pipeline: collects item buffs + perk buffs + weapon art buffs, applies applyBuffPerkModifiers, converts Tailwind to Whirlwind, and applies Cauterize burn→singed conversion.

nodes.label: getPerkBuffs
nodes.description: Iterates all perks and invokes their factory functions from PERK_BUFFS to generate GrantedBuff arrays.

nodes.label: getWeaponArtBuffs
nodes.description: Returns weapon-art-granted buffs from WEAPON_ART_BUFF_MAP (Warrior Stomp, Javelin, Lightning Cloak, Cursed Ground).

nodes.label: getTrueBalanceBuffs
nodes.description: Converts active debuffs to corresponding buffs via TRUE_BALANCE_DEBUFF_MAP (e.g., Bleed→Regen, Frostbite→Tailwind, Shatter→Reinforce, Weakness→Rage, Despair→Inspired).

nodes.label: getActiveBuildBuffs
nodes.description: Collects all item-granted buffs by checking equipped slots (rune, ring, armor, weapon) against BUFFS_BY_ITEM_SOURCE, plus race-specific buffs.

nodes.label: applyCauterizeConversion
nodes.description: When Cauterize is active and Cursed Flames is not, marks non-self Burn entries with burnMode: 'singed' for burst-on-application behavior.

nodes.label: calcBuffEffect
nodes.description: Computes a buff's numeric effect from potency: value = effectPerTenthPotency * potency * 10. Returns value, unit, and formatted label.

nodes.label: convertTailwindToWhirlwind
nodes.description: When Whirlwind perk is active, renames all Tailwind buffs to Whirlwind with extended duration and adds an AoE Bleed application.

nodes.label: getBuffDescription
nodes.description: Renders a buff's description string, using dynamicDescription if available, or applying potency-based text substitution for Weakness/Shatter/Anti Heal.

nodes.label: TypedDmgBoost.ts
nodes.description: Calculates per-damage-type multipliers for buffs and perks that boost specific damage types (Rage for physical/magic/water/true/hex, Glyph Conduit for magic, Photosynthesis for holy/earth, Converted Energy for all types). Aggregates multiplicative multipliers per type and returns heal multiplier.

nodes.label: TypedDmgBoostCtx
nodes.description: Context for typed damage boost calculations: perks, active buffs, sunlight state, draconic color.

nodes.label: TypedDmgBoostEntry
nodes.description: Single active typed damage boost result: perk name, label, affected types, damage/heal multipliers, condition, and group applicability.

nodes.label: TypedDmgBoostResult
nodes.description: Aggregated result: dmgMultByType record (per-type multiplicative multipliers), healMult, and list of active entries.

nodes.label: calcTypedDmgBoosts
nodes.description: Evaluates TYPED_DMG_BOOST_DEFS against current state, computing per-type multiplicative damage multipliers and heal multiplier from active buffs/perks.

nodes.label: perkAutoDebuffs.ts
nodes.description: Computes automatic debuffs applied by perks under specific conditions. Handles Exhaust→Burn, Penance bleed at low HP, Melting Shred→Anti Heal, Fungal Prototype/Venom Spitter/Toxin Caster→Poison, Gorecast→Bleed, Bellowing Ember→Burn, Frostbite→Slowness, Gelid Lance→Bleed from Slowness, Weakening→Weakness, Sunburn→Burn, Fiery Pursuit→Burn, Hypnotist→Hypnotized, and enemy-HP-threshold debuffs.

nodes.label: AutoDebuffInput
nodes.description: Input for auto-debuff calculation: existing/player buff names, perks, HP fill, level, protection, WA proc coefficient, enemy HP fill, and damage type flags.

nodes.label: calcActualHpFillPct
nodes.description: Adjusts HP fill percentage for negative protection by computing effective max HP (clamped to 10% of base), returning the reduced HP percentage.

nodes.label: getAutoDebuffs
nodes.description: Main auto-debuff generator. Checks ~15 perk conditions against existing buffs and applies appropriate debuffs (Burn, Bleed, Poison, Slowness, Weakness, Hypnotized, Anti Heal) with their source-specific conditions and durations.

nodes.label: buffs.ts
nodes.description: All buff/debuff numeric constants: potency-per-tenth values, item/rune/wa perk buff potencies and durations, True Balance coefficients, PERK_BUFFS factory constants (Perfection, Bounce Momentum, Toadzerker, Wrathful Crits, Blood Lust, etc.), BUFF_POTENCY_MODIFIERS (Gladiatorial Rage, Mage Rage, Oceans Rage, etc.), and GENERIC_DEBUFF_MODIFIERS (Endless Despair, Stored Corruption).

nodes.label: crit.ts
nodes.description: Critical hit calculation engine. Computes natural crit chance (from dexterity, elemental boost perks, Perfection), extra crit chance (Carrying Winds, Caci King Spirit), and crit damage multiplier (from Thief Training, elemental boosts, Venom Eater, Vital Strikes, Spark, Critical Master, Splinter). Handles Primal perk which divides natural crit and crit damage by PRIMAL_DIVISOR. Applies proc coefficient scaling (positiveOnly for natural crits, King's Luck) and combines independent crit chances via 1-(1-p1)(1-p2)...

nodes.label: CritResult
nodes.description: Complete crit calculation result: natural/extra crit chances, effective crit chances with/without proc scaling, crit damage multiplier, breakdown arrays for all sources, Primal state, formula string, and proc scaling info.

nodes.label: calcCrit
nodes.description: Main crit calculation function. Sums natural crit sources (dexterity, Seismic Momentum, elemental boosts, Perfection), extra sources (Carrying Winds, King's Luck), applies Primal divisor, computes combined crit probability, calculates crit damage multiplier from all sources, and applies proc coefficient scaling.

nodes.label: build.ts
nodes.description: Top-level build calculation orchestrator. Accumulates stats and perks from all equipment slots (race, guild, armor, ring, rune, weapon, infusions), applies enchantments, finalizes perks (Perk Effectiveness, Cursed, Buckler→Parry, Grantor→Potency tags), computes CDR, stat boosts, emotional attack speed, Gladiatorial Rage armor pen, buff assembly, crit calculation, and all damage boosts. The calcBuild function is the main entry point for the entire damage calculator.

nodes.label: CDRResult
nodes.description: Cooldown reduction result: rune CDR multiplier, weapon art CDR multiplier, optional rune set cooldown, and breakdown arrays for both.

nodes.label: BuildResult
nodes.description: Final build output: boosted stats, finalized perks, CDR result, damage boosts result, and crit result.

nodes.label: calcCDR
nodes.description: Computes rune and weapon art cooldown reduction from perks (CDR_PERK_DATA), race cooldown modifiers, emotional state (buffs-only CDR), and rune-specific filters.

nodes.label: calcBoosts
nodes.description: Iterates all BOOST_DEFS, evaluating each against the current context (perks, crit chance, potencies, race, HP, etc.), plus Level Damage and race-specific effects. Returns multiplicative damage multiplier and entry list.

nodes.label: accumulateEquipment
nodes.description: Aggregates raw stats and perks from all equipment: race modifiers, guild rank stats/perks, helmet/chestplate/leggings with enchantments and upgrades, ring and rune, weapon (standard blade+handle or monk glove+essence), and infusion slots.

nodes.label: finalizePerks
nodes.description: Post-processes raw perks: removes zeros, applies Perk Effectiveness/Cursed scaling, merges Buckler into Parry, and propagates Grantor perk amounts to Potency perks (Bleed/Burn/Poison Potency).

nodes.label: calcBuild
nodes.description: Main entry point for the entire build calculation pipeline. Calls accumulateEquipment → finalizePerks → deriveResults (which computes CDR, stat boosts, crit, buffs, and damage boosts).

nodes.label: deriveResults
nodes.description: Takes raw stats and finalized perks, computes boosted stats (stat boost perks, emotional attack speed, Gladiatorial Rage armor pen), CDR, crit, warding debuff multiplier, buff assembly, buff potencies for boost context, HP fill adjustment for protection, weapon damage types, and finally all damage boosts.

nodes.label: computeBuffs
nodes.description: Assembles all active buffs via assembleActiveBuffs and computes Ork buff tenacity bonus.

nodes.label: accumulateMonkWeapon
nodes.description: Accumulates monk glove and essence stats with shrine multipliers and rank-based perk bonuses.

nodes.label: accumulateStandardWeapon
nodes.description: Accumulates blade and handle stats with optional shrine multipliers.

edges.label: imports constants from
edges.details: Imports ~25 buff/perk constants (FRENZY_BASE, BLOOD_THIRSTY_MULT_PER_STACK, VENOM_SPITTER_MULT_PER_STACK, etc.) from ../lib/constants

edges.label: imports constants from
edges.details: Imports 80+ buff/debuff potency and duration constants from ../lib/constants/buffs

edges.label: imports from
edges.details: Imports getActiveBuildBuffs, getPerkBuffs, getWeaponArtBuffs, applyBuffPerkModifiers, convertTailwindToWhirlwind, assembleActiveBuffs, BUFF_DEFS

edges.label: conceptually related: buff potencies feed boost context
reads buff definitions for typed boost evaluation
